fields.name: request_id
fields.description: UUID of the request sent to the Inputs API, generated by the Oscilar server

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: UUID of the record associated with the primary key of this object. In case there is no primary key defined, record_id will be equal to request_id. This is set when the record is created and maintained across updates

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: event ingestion time, as recorded by the server and represented in ISO format, using UTC as timezone

fields.name: request_id
fields.description: UUID of the request sent to the Inputs API, generated by the Oscilar server

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: UUID of the record associated with the primary key of this object. In case there is no primary key defined, record_id will be equal to request_id. This is set when the record is created and maintained across updates

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: event ingestion time, as recorded by the server and represented in ISO format, using UTC as timezone

edges.name: High Risk - Device and Behavior
edges.description: Deny user if device score and behavior score is high

edges.name: Medium Risk - Device AND Behavior
edges.description: Check user device and behavior score is in acceptable range

condition.plaintext: osc_device_score >= 25 AND osc_device_score < 75 AND (osc_behavior_score >= 25 AND osc_behavior_score < 75)

edges.name: Medium Risk - Device OR Behavior
edges.description: Check if device or behavior score is in acceptable range

condition.plaintext: osc_device_score >= 25 OR osc_device_score <= 75 OR osc_behavior_score >= 25 AND osc_behavior_score <= 75

edges.name: Device Blocklist
edges.description: Check if device is in blocklist

edges.name: IP Address Blocklist
edges.description: Check if IP is in blocklist

edges.name: Device Velocity (Last Day)
edges.description: Multiple onboading events from the same device over the last day

edges.name: Device Velocity (One Week)
edges.description: Multiple onboading events from the same device over the last week

edges.name: Device Velocity (One Month)
edges.description: Multiple onboading events from the same device over the last month

edges.name: IP Velocity (Last Day)
edges.description: Multiple onboading events from the same ip address over the last day

edges.name: IP Velocity (One Week)
edges.description: Multiple onboading events from the same ip address over the last week

edges.name: IP Velocity (One Month)
edges.description: Multiple onboading events from the same ip address over the last month

edges.name: Email Age
edges.description: Check if email is older than one year

edges.name: Temporary Email
edges.description: Check if email domain is in temporary email list

edges.name: Deny Email Risk Score
edges.description: Check if email risk score is higher then acceptable threshold

edges.name: Email Low Risk
edges.description: Increase user_risk_score based on email risk

edges.name: Email Medium Risk
edges.description: Increase user_risk_score based on email risk

edges.name: Email High Risk
edges.description: Increase user_risk_score based on email risk
